title: WATCH: Powell says he plans to stay at Fed after chair term ends amid legal attacks by the Trump administration
author: Sigma Capital
metaDescription: Jerome Powell plans to stay on the Federal Reserve board after his term as chair ends, citing legal attacks by the Trump administration. He intends to remain fo
excerpt: Jerome Powell plans to stay on the Federal Reserve board after his term as chair ends, citing legal attacks by the Trump administration. He intends to remain for an unspecified duration. Powell's decision aims to preserve the Fed's independence.

content.introduction: Jerome Powell plans to stay on the Federal Reserve board after his term as chair ends, citing legal attacks by the Trump administration. He intends to remain for an unspecified duration. Powell's decision aims to preserve the Fed's independence.

WASHINGTON (AP) — Jerome Powell said Wednesday he plans [to remain](https://apnews.com/article/federal-reserve-trump-economy-4c26310b28f64178a1f521d27d0c8db5) on the board of the Federal Reserve after his term as chair ends next month “for a period of time, to be determined,” saying the “unprecedented” legal attacks by the Trump administration have put the independence of the nation’s central bank at risk. (AP Photo/Cliff Owen)](https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/03e8185/2147483647/strip/true/crop/6048x4024+0+0/resize/599x399!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.apnews.com%2Fcf%2F86%2F417e706b53db93c4ff51cce6c900%2Fe96e421d4d1c49d2915e33326be42cc5)](https://apnews.com/article/federal-reserve-jerome-powell-kevin-warsh-interest-rates-a6de6854e24e7b43cd8fa1431f455841). [Unorthodox leadership change at the Fed: Warsh on deck while Powell remains](https://apnews.com/article/federal-reserve-jerome-powell-kevin-warsh-interest-rates-a6de6854e24e7b43cd8fa1431f455841). [13](https://apnews.com/article/federal-reserve-jerome-powell-kevin-warsh-interest-rates-a6de6854e24e7b43cd8fa1431f455841). [Kevin Warsh is one step closer to top job at the Fed after Trump’s pick approved by Senate committee](https://apnews.com/article/federal-reserve-warsh-powell-513775b602b05b33b3d71c975cb62209). He has argued in favor of rate cuts, as Trump has demanded, but he will [likely find it harder to implement them](https://apnews.com/article/inflation-trump-federal-reserve-warsh-bcaac06bfee8bb92a900366b2d03ce01) with inflation topping 3%, above the Fed’s target of 2%.

## Jerome Powell plans to remain on the board of the Federal Reserve after his term as chair ends next month “for an undetermined period of time,” saying the “unprecedented” legal attacks by the Trump administration have put the independence of the nation’s central bank at risk. WASHINGTON — Jerome Powell plans to remain on the board of the Federal Reserve after his term as chair ends next month “for an undetermined period of time,” saying the “unprecedented” legal attacks by the Trump administration have put the independence of the nation’s central bank at risk. “I worry these attacks are battering this institution and putting at risk the things that really matter to the public,” Powell said in fairly candid remarks at a press conference after the Fed announced its decision to keep its benchmark interest rate unchanged. 6 G@E6] !@H6== H@F=5 4@?
